violations.text: An employee was observed touching ready to eat food chips with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (pickle slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The handwashing sink in the dishwasher area is in poor repair. Cold water won't turn on. A plumbing system must be maintained in good repair. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

The floor in the dipper well area has an accumulation of water. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

Soups, meatballs, turkey and gravy which was previously cooked and cooled, was only reheated to (105-129) degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
Various food products were observed being held passed the expiration date.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food was observed on the cook line and food storage area upstairs. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
Several pans were observed with adhesive stickers. FOOD shall be protected from contamination that may result from a factor or source. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

Employees personal items were observed being stored near prep units and cook kitchen lines. Employees personal items may not be stored with/near food meant for retail sale. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
Single service items(Fish Buckets) are not being stored properly in their original protective package in the basement storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023
Walk cooler in the kitchen area was not in good repair(observed ice buildup arounds doors, and plumbing line and bottom of the door was warped). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

Observed exposed wood in the dessert display cooler and the food storage shelves upstairs. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
3 bay sink located in the downstairs bakery area was not in good repair(observed leak).The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the:1.food storage racks in walk in cooler and bakery walk in cooler have an accumulation of food residue and debris.2.food bins in walk in cooler observed with biofilm and food residue. 3.gaskets in the salad prep observed with food residue and biofilm.4.lights and hoods observed with dust and soil residue.5.prep area shelves observed with an accumulation of food residue and debris6.electrical wires over cook line observed with an accumulation of dust7.ice scoop holster were observed with biofilm and food residue.Physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

Plumbing observed for condensate from ice machine was observed in poor repair. Cup was observed being held over plumbing line. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair.. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

The condensate from the basement walk in cooler and bar lines was observed draining into large buckets. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

The floors and walls in the bakery walk in cooler downstairs and walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

The following physical facilities were in poor repair:1.floors in the back kitchen area is in poor repair(cracked and missing tiles).2.holes observed in walls(upstairs) and warped FRP observed on walls(downstairs).The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023

The vents throughout kitchen, downstairs walk in cooler, and upstairs storage area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023
